Penpot plugins API
    Preparing search index...
    • Shadow

    Interface Shadow

    Represents shadow properties in Penpot. This interface includes properties for defining drop shadows and inner shadows, along with their visual attributes.

    interface Shadow {
        id?: string;
        style?: "drop-shadow" | "inner-shadow";
        offsetX?: number;
        offsetY?: number;
        blur?: number;
        spread?: number;
        hidden?: boolean;
        color?: Color;
    }
    • Defined in index.d.ts:3466
    Index

    Properties

    id? style? offsetX? offsetY? blur? spread? hidden? color?

    Properties

    Optionalid

    id?: string

    The optional unique identifier for the shadow.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:3470

    Optionalstyle

    style?: "drop-shadow" | "inner-shadow"

    The optional style of the shadow.

    • 'drop-shadow': A shadow cast outside the element.
    • 'inner-shadow': A shadow cast inside the element.
    • Defined in index.d.ts:3476

    OptionaloffsetX

    offsetX?: number

    The optional X-axis offset of the shadow.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:3480

    OptionaloffsetY

    offsetY?: number

    The optional Y-axis offset of the shadow.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:3484

    Optionalblur

    blur?: number

    The optional blur radius of the shadow.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:3488

    Optionalspread

    spread?: number

    The optional spread radius of the shadow.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:3492

    Optionalhidden

    hidden?: boolean

    Specifies whether the shadow is hidden. Defaults to false if omitted.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:3497

    Optionalcolor

    color?: Color

    The optional color of the shadow, defined by a Color object.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:3501

    Settings
